# Documentation map

What lives where in this repository. **Updated automatically** when you run `python scripts/docs/validate_adr.py`.

## Repository layout

| Path | Contents |
|------|----------|
| `src/content/dags/` | Published DAG markdown (site) |
| `src/content/nodes/` | MeSH-backed node vocabulary (site) |
| `docs/adr/` | Architecture Decision Records |
| `docs/conventions/` | Naming and schema rules |
| `docs/workflow/` | Contribution and review guides |
| [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) | How to submit a new DAG |
| `_templates/dag-template.md` | DAG file template |
| `_templates/adr-template.md` | ADR file template |
| `scripts/dag/validate_dag.py` | DAG frontmatter validation |
| `scripts/nodes/validate_nodes.py` | Node vocabulary validation |
| `scripts/docs/validate_adr.py` | ADR validation + regenerates this file |
| `scripts/docs/generate_docs_index.py` | MAP.md generator |
| `scripts/deploy/` | Deployment checks (reserved) |
